description: Pre-action gates. level: warn (log only) or block (deny tool call). Add your own rules here.

gates.name: no-force-push
gates.message: Force push blocked. Use regular push or ask first.

gates.name: no-credentials-in-files
gates.message: Credential/API key detected in file write. Use env vars instead.

gates.name: no-git-reset-hard
gates.message: git reset --hard detected. Make sure this is intentional.
